name: Red Beans & Rice (Sks)
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a non-stick stew pot with 2 teaspoons olive oil.
2. In the pot, sauté onions, celery, and red peppers until tender.
3. Add crushed tomatoes to the pot.
4. Stir in spices (cumin, cilantro, chili powder).
5. Simmer for 15 minutes.
6. Add rinsed kidney beans to the mixture.
7. Heat through everything.
8. Serve over brown rice.
